text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the Satsuki Sho reaches its climax, Admire
Vega lets out a roar. Her desire to best her rivals
burns like a flame. But in the end, she loses to
T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her passion holds strong even after returning to
the academy. There, she sees Narita Top Road
preparing for the next race, the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she wonders aloud about her competition's
progress and what it means for the future, I note
that she's finally expressing excitement over her
upcoming races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt that she's beginning to
appreciate the joy of racing against her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However... despite the welcome change, the skies
remain bleak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With signs of significant change on the horizon,
we begin counting down the days to the Japanese
Derby.
